leadText: Peck (Japanese: つつく Peck) is a damage-dealing Flying-type move introduced in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Peck inflicts damage and can hit non-adjacent opponents in Triple Battles . Peck can be used as the first move of a Pokémon Contest combination , causing Drill Peck and Fury Attack to score double the normal appeal if used in the next turn. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Physical Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 35 42 Cooldown 6s Move wind-up time 10 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect — — — None

sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad A standard Flying -type attack. It is favored by Pok é mon that have beaks and/or horns. Stad2 A standard Flying -type attack. It is favored by Pok é mon with beaks or horns. G S C Jabs the foe with a beak, etc. R S E Attacks the foe with a jabbing beak, etc. Colo XD Attacks the target with a jabbing beak, etc. FR LG D P Pt HG SS PBR The foe is jabbed with a sharply pointed beak or horn. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The target is jabbed with a sharply pointed beak or horn. S V The target is jabbed with a sharply pointed beak or horn to inflict damage. ZA The user attacks by jabbing targets with a sharply pointed beak or horn.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる MD GtI S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] In some games, the Pokédex states that Pidgeotto "will fiercely peck at any intruder". However, Pidgeotto is unable to learn Peck.
